query: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS health_buckets; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS health_workouts; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS health_upload_jobs; DELETE FROM __drizzle_migrations WHERE hash LIKE '%0003%' OR hash LIKE '%0004%';
